purpose: First Indonesian monolingual output-channel baseline. Active benchmark execution uses OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17 via config/benchmark_model.json; this command must not use the OpenAI smoke-only override. Benchmark rules/private state may remain in English.

preconditions.check: Runner must instruct both agents to output only Indonesian during interaction.
preconditions.why: C1 ID is a channel condition, not a translated-prompt condition.
Baseline episodes must call the local NegotiationArena checkout.

preconditions.check: Validate assigned-language output share, code-switch rate, and off-pair share for the transcript.
preconditions.why: C1 evidence is valid only if output-channel compliance is measured.
Baselines are benchmark evidence and now use the explicit OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17 benchmark model. OpenAI benchmark artifacts must be labeled as OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17 evidence.
